description: A top-down view of a space scene. A yellow sphere (sun) is stationary near the centre. A blue box (ship) orbits around the sun. Three green arrow shapes (astronauts) move near the ship, maintaining their positions relative to the ship as it orbits.
questions: Is there a yellow sphere visible in the scene?
Is the yellow sphere stationary (same position across frames)?
Is there a blue box visible in the scene?
Does the blue box change position between frames (orbiting)?
Are there green arrow-shaped objects visible in the scene?
Do the green objects move with the blue box as it orbits?
Are all objects visible against the background in every frame?
